tasks_completed: Enrich src/pricing.py with multi-signal surge (demand_pressure, velocity, cooldown)
Update useHealth.ts types with SurgeSignals interface and Service fields
Update Ticker.tsx to show trend arrows (rising ↑ rose, falling ↓ sage)
Update FlowerNode.tsx to show demand pressure dotted ring when demand_pressure > 1.5
learnings: pricing.py: _surge_state dict stores last_multiplier + last_updated + peak_multiplier per service for cooldown
get_surge_info() returns {price, surge_multiplier, surge_signals} — health endpoint uses it, get_current_price() delegates to it
_demand_pressure() reads txlog.get_recent(500) and filters by event_type + keyword match + time window
_cooldown_multiplier() returns ratio >= 1.0 to hold prices during decay; returns 1.0 when not in cooldown
Trend (rising/falling/stable) is determined by comparing final multiplier to _surge_state last_multiplier with 0.05 threshold
FlowerNode dotted ring: highDemand = demandPressure > 1.5, renders SVG <circle> with strokeDasharray='4 6'
Ticker uses s.current_price (from /health) in preference to client-side surge calc
